title: Titan Upgrade
description: Another step into minecraft tool progression
body:
This mod introduces Titanium, a new high-tier material that lets players push their gear beyond Netherite. Explore the world to collect Titanium Ore, refine it into ingots, and use a new craftable upgrade template to take your Netherite Sword to the next level.

Upgrading your sword with Titanium boosts its damage, durability, and overall combat effectiveness, giving you a powerful new end-game weapon without breaking the vanilla balance. The Titanium Upgrade is fully integrated into Minecraft’s smithing system, offering a smooth and intuitive progression path for players who want just one more step above Netherite.
